Class MachinePlayer

java.lang.Object
com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Player
com.example.elcincuentazo.model.MachinePlayer
public class MachinePlayer extends Player
Represents an AI-controlled player in a Cincuentazo game.

Machine players use a simple greedy strategy: they choose the playable card whose delta brings the table sum as close to 50 as possible without exceeding it. This maximises pressure on the remaining human and machine opponents.

Timing (2–4 s to "think", 1–2 s to draw) is enforced by TurnManager rather than inside this class, keeping the model free of threading concerns.

See Also:
  • Player
  • HumanPlayer
  • TurnManager

  • Constructor Details

    • MachinePlayer

      public MachinePlayer(int machineNumber)
      Constructs a machine player with a numbered display name, e.g. "Máquina 1".
      Parameters:
      machineNumber - 1-based index used to distinguish multiple machines

  • Method Details

    • isHuman

      public boolean isHuman()
      Always returns false because this is an AI-controlled player.
      Specified by:
      isHuman in class Player
      Returns:
      false

    • chooseBestCard

      public Card chooseBestCard(int currentSum)
      Selects the best card to play from the machine's hand using a greedy strategy.

      Strategy:

      1. Collect all playable cards (those that keep the sum ≤ 50).
      2. Among those, prefer the card that results in the highest table sum (maximises pressure on opponents).
      3. If multiple cards produce the same resulting sum, pick the first one found.
      Parameters:
      currentSum - the current table sum before this machine plays
      Returns:
      the chosen Card, or null if no card is playable (the machine should then be eliminated by GameLogic)

    • getPlayableCards

      public List<Card> getPlayableCards(int currentSum)
      Returns all cards in the machine's hand that could legally be played.
      Parameters:
      currentSum - the current table sum
      Returns:
      list of playable Cards; empty if none can be played
